summary: Code review and frontend verification of PDF export/download feature for sales invoices and sales returns. All implementation elements verified through code review. UI buttons verified present (create buttons visible on both pages). No actual invoices exist in DB to test PDF download functionality, but code structure is correct.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - low priority, does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export feature code review completed. SalesInvoicePrint.jsx now exports both printInvoice and downloadPdf functions. downloadPdf uses html2pdf.js to generate PDFs with the same monochrome Khayratna template. Both SalesInvoicePage and SalesReturnPage have PDF download buttons in list actions and view dialogs. No existing invoices/returns in DB to test actual download. Key implementation: hidden container approach (line 269-274), logo wait (lines 290-297), html2pdf config (lines 300-310).
